title: Design a MapReduce Shuffler
shortDescription: Design a shuffler component for MapReduce that enables efficient communication and data transfer between Mapper and Reducer nodes. The system should handle data partitioning, sorting, and distribution across the cluster.

Design a MapReduce Shuffler

Design a shuffler component for MapReduce that enables efficient communication and data transfer between Mapper and Reducer nodes. The system should handle data partitioning, sorting, and distribution across the cluster.
